title: Google Maps Reviews Scraper
description: Extract customer reviews from a specific Google Maps business. Paste a business_id from Google Maps Search, Advanced Search, Autocomplete, or Business Details.

business_id.title: Business ID
business_id.description: Google Maps business/place ID in 0x[hex]:0x[hex] format. To get one, run Google Maps Search or Advanced Search and copy the business_id field from the business you want to monitor.

sort.title: Sort Reviews By
sort.description: Review order. Use Newest for monitoring, Most Relevant for representative samples, or rating sorts for sentiment QA.

limit.title: Limit Per Page
limit.description: Number of reviews to return on this page. Start with 5-10 for a first test, then increase to 20 for production pagination.

page.title: Page Token
page.description: Paste the nextPage token from a previous run to retrieve the next page of reviews.

search.title: Search Within Reviews
search.description: Optional keyword to match inside reviews, for example service, price, delivery, warranty, or rude.

use_cache.title: Use Cache
use_cache.description: Use cached results if available to reduce costs and speed up results

maximum_cache_age.title: Maximum Cache Age (seconds)
maximum_cache_age.description: Maximum age of cached results in seconds. Set to 0 to always fetch fresh data.
